title: An inspiring visit at the Gates Foundation Visitor Center (Seattle, WA)
content: I love how interactive the Gates Center is and how it really makes you think about what we might be able do to help each other have a decent

title: Get Inspired at the Gates Foundation Visitor Center - Seattle's Child
content: The Visitor Center is beautifully and brilliantly designed. Highly interactive, the exhibits are not only informative but incredibly interesting as well.

title: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Visitor Center - Whichmuseum
content: Some visitors note that while the content is extensive, it can be overwhelming for those seeking a quick visit. The free admission is widely appreciated.

title: Gates Foundation Discovery Center | Seattle WA - Facebook
content: The Gates Foundation Discovery Center features interactive exhibits and ways to take action on causes you care about. Free for all.
